full_prompt: Design the primary structural frame of an autonomous payload-delivery machine benchmark intended to collect two payload objects from Zone A, transport them across an obstacle track, and deposit them in Zone B within 60 seconds. The entire machine must fit within a 600 mm x 600 mm x 600 mm starting cube at the start line and its total mass must not exceed 10 kg. The structural frame is built from 6061-T6 aluminum tube and plate (Young's modulus 68.9 GPa, Poisson 0.33, yield 276 MPa, ultimate 310 MPa, density 2700 kg/m^3). Primary load cases: (LC1) payload lift: each of two steel payload cubes weighs 1.5 kg; lift both simultaneously from the front scoop arm at a 0.3 m horizontal moment arm forward of the front axle (total moment 8.83 Nm, total load 29.4 N down); (LC2) track obstacle: drive over a 30 mm step at 0.5 m/s, modeled as 3 g vertical impulse on the front axle with base mass 10 kg; (LC3) collision arrest: full machine travelling at 1.0 m/s decelerates from a fixed wall impact in 50 ms (2 m/s^2 = 20 g equivalent) applied to the front of the frame; (LC4) 60-second duty cycle at 1.5 Hz drivetrain oscillation between +/- nominal 29.4 N payload load (90 cycles total). Pass/fail: LC1-LC3 max von Mises stress below 184 MPa (276/1.5), front-arm deflection at 0.3 m arm tip below 5 mm under LC1, scoop motion must not violate the 600 mm starting envelope until after the start-line crossing. First natural frequency of the payload arm must exceed 15 Hz. Deliverables: STEP model, per-case FEA, modal, and a mass budget spreadsheet breaking out drive, structure, and mechanism mass.
short_prompt:
Design the primary structural frame of an autonomous payload-delivery machine that collects two payload cubes from Zone A, crosses an obstacle track, and deposits them in Zone B within 60 seconds. Material class: 6061-T6 aluminum tube and plate. No external standard is named in the source; design to a 1.5 FoS on yield.

Envelope: must fit inside a 600 mm cube at the start line and total mass <= 10 kg. Two steel payload cubes of 1.5 kg each.

Load cases.
- LC1 payload lift: 29.4 N down + 8.83 Nm moment at the front scoop arm, 0.3 m forward of the front axle.
- LC2 30 mm step at 0.5 m/s: 3 g vertical impulse on the front axle, 10 kg base mass.
- LC3 wall collision: 20 g equivalent on the front of the frame (decel from 1.0 m/s in 50 ms).
- LC4 duty cycle: 90 cycles of +/- 29.4 N at 1.5 Hz at the payload arm.

prompt.title: Autonomous payload-delivery robot frame
prompt.brief: Aluminum primary frame for a dual-payload delivery autonomous machine under a 10 kg + 600 mm cube constraint.

load_cases.name: payload_lift
load_cases.application: front scoop arm at 0.3 m arm
